title: DepthFLUX: Metric Depth Estimation and Completion from FLUX
teaser: A compact, unified model for metric depth estimation and depth completion, fine-tuned from the pretrained FLUX2 image generator.
abstract: The recent success of Vision Banana shows that generative vision pretraining is an effective paradigm for visual understanding, with image generation serving as a universal interface for both generation and understanding tasks. In this project, we explore developing a unified model for both metric depth estimation and depth completion by fine-tuning the open-source FLUX2 model.
milestones: Develop separate models for depth estimation and depth completion by fine-tuning FLUX2.
Develop a unified model that handles both depth estimation and depth completion.
Evaluate and compare against state-of-the-art metric-depth and depth-completion methods.

prerequisites.label: Advanced Deep Learning for Computer Vision: Visual Computing (ADL4CV)

references.label: InfiniDepth: Arbitrary-Resolution and Fine-Grained Depth Estimation with Neural Implicit Fields
